tasks.title: Negate tiltAngle in public/js/main.js to fix inverted head tilt
tasks.description: The production-served file public/js/main.js passes tiltAngle to updatePhysics without negation, resulting in inverted head tilt controls. The root js/main.js already has the fix (-tiltAngle). Apply the same one-character fix to public/js/main.js.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: When the user tilts their head to the left, the ball moves to the left. When the user tilts their head to the right, the ball moves to the right. The fix must be applied in public/js/main.js line 387.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are fixing an inverted head tilt control in a browser-based ball game called Teeter.

## What to do

Change ONE line in `public/js/main.js`. In the `gameLoop` function (around line 387), change:
```js
const result = updatePhysics(dt, tiltAngle, pitch, mouthOpen);
```
to:
```js
const result = updatePhysics(dt, -tiltAngle, pitch, mouthOpen);
```

This matches the fix already present in `js/main.js:301`.

## Why

The tilt signal is negated in tracker.js (mirror correction) and again in physics.js (lateral velocity calculation). Two negations cancel out, resulting in inverted controls. Adding a third negation here restores correct behavior.

## Conventions
- This is a vanilla JS project with ES modules, no build step
- Do NOT modify tracker.js or physics.js
- The only file to change is `public/js/main.js`
- No new dependencies needed

checklist.description: Negate tiltAngle in public/js/main.js updatePhysics call
steps: Find line ~387: `const result = updatePhysics(dt, tiltAngle, pitch, mouthOpen);`
Change to: `const result = updatePhysics(dt, -tiltAngle, pitch, mouthOpen);`

checklist.description: Verify both main.js files now have consistent tiltAngle negation
steps: Grep for 'updatePhysics' in both js/main.js and public/js/main.js
Confirm both pass -tiltAngle (not tiltAngle) to updatePhysics

quality_checklist.description: Only the tiltAngle parameter is negated, no other changes
steps: Run git diff to confirm exactly one character changed (added '-' prefix)
Verify no other files were modified

verification.buildCommand: echo 'No build step required — vanilla JS project'

checks.description: Head tilt left moves ball left, head tilt right moves ball right
steps: Allow camera access and wait for head tracking to initialize
Tilt head to the left — verify ball moves left
Tilt head to the right — verify ball moves right
